scripts.db:ready: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.dev: pnpm run db:ready && (doppler run -- nuxt dev || nuxt dev)
scripts.quality: echo 'Turbo dependsOn handles lint + typecheck + format:check'
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer/drizzle/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/seed-elements.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/0016_backfill_prompt_element_attributes.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/0017_backfill_unstructured_prompt_element_attributes.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/seed-generations.sql
scripts.db:seed:elements: wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/seed-elements.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/0016_backfill_prompt_element_attributes.sql && wrangler d1 execute narduk-ai-db --local --file=drizzle/0017_backfill_unstructured_prompt_element_attributes.sql
scripts.db:reset: bash ../../tools/db-migrate.sh narduk-ai-db --local --dir node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer/drizzle --dir drizzle --reset && pnpm run db:seed
